stemHtml: The crew prepares for landing in a mountainous area. The aircraft dispatched with one radio altimeter inoperative and, while airborne, the second radio altimeter fails. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The pilot can rely on barometric minimums (DH) during the approach in Low Visibility Operations (LVO).
options.b: You cannot trust GPWS warnings in this situation.
options.c: The aircraft can use other navigation aids to replace the function of the radio altimeters.
